## [09:02 - 12:03]

So some of you might know that we have a conscious mind and a subconscious mind. And the conscious mind is the one that if you pick a room of 100 people and you ask the room, how many of you want to be financially independent? How many people do you think in that room would keep their hand up? Realistically, it's 1 to 3%. So maximum three people in a room of 100 who consciously say that they want to be financially independent are actually financially independent. And what that means is in that 1 to 3%, their subconscious says that they want to be financially independent as much as their conscious mind says. For the rest of the 97% of people, their subconscious is dictating that something else is more important to them than financial independence. And that is the absolute truth. That is how it works.
